name: Shimizu Akari
mainAbility: Greataxe Skills / Power of the Sun

stats.label: Agility
stats.description: Critical Hit Rate and Critical Hit Damage

basic.name: Axe of Punishment
basic.description: Akari swings her axe to attack, dealing Light elemental damage.

core.name: Judgement Strike
core.description: Akari charges, penetrates the enemy, and strikes down powerfully. Inflicts Airborne on final hit.

skill.name: Devastate
skill.description: Akari swings her axe twice, does a follow-up attack, then finally does a diagonal slash. Knock Down on final hit, Airborne from bursting flame.

skill.name: Light of Dawn
skill.description: Akari uses the power of the sun to light her axe on fire, then attacks. Activates Holy Fire on Light team members (charges Power Gauge 0.6%/s, 24s). Holy Fire grants Echo of Light: 2% Max HP Shield (stacks 15x).

support.name: Guiding Light
support.description: After gathering enemies, Akari releases a powerful attack with her fiery axe. Applies Halo of Light: +10% damage, +10% Critical Rate (Basic/Ultimate), restores 10% Max HP (24s).

qte.name: Heart Strike of Blazing Fire
qte.description: Akari rushes forward and releases a powerful upward diagonal strike. Triggers on Extreme Evasion, Core Attack, Ultimate, Stun, or Blind. Activates Divine Flame: +1% Light damage taken (stacks 10x, 24s).

ultimate.name: Ring of Fire
ultimate.description: Akari gathers sun power, creates annular eclipse, splits the world. Knock Down on hit. Grants Brilliance to Light members (+8% damage, +8% Crit Rate, 8% Max HP restore, 24s). Applies Ring of Fire: +12% Light damage taken (24s).

passive.name: Truth-seeker of Divine Flame
passive.description: Activates at battle start. When using Light of Dawn, Devastate becomes Heavy Attack: Devastate (+100% damage). Dash hit activates Extreme Evasion, deals damage, and inflicts Stun.

advancements: Enhances Truth-seeker of Divine Flame and Holy Fire. Divine Flame inflicts 2x stacks; Light attacks activate Echo of Light (20s cooldown). Holy Fire charges Power Gauge 1.6%/s, reduces damage 12%.
+5% Max HP; +5% Shield for Light members.
Divine Flame enhanced to 1.6% damage. Auto-triggers Ring of Fire at max stacks. Ring of Fire increases Light damage taken 20% (60s duration).
+3% Light damage per Light member; +3% Defense for highest Defense member.
Brilliance enhanced: +16% damage, +16% Crit Rate, 16% Max HP restore.
